description: Ensuring rapid AI-driven automation does not leave millions without livelihoods, by creating new pathways to employment and income security.
Protecting government revenue bases as AI erodes traditional tax streams, and building fiscal resilience for the transition period.
Preventing extreme concentration of AI-generated wealth and ensuring broad-based benefit from productivity gains.
Avoiding monopolistic control of critical AI infrastructure and ensuring competitive, accessible AI ecosystems.
Adapting education and training systems so workers can continuously acquire relevant skills in a rapidly changing economy.
Ensuring essential public services remain reliable, accessible, and human-centred as AI transforms service delivery.
Maintaining democratic accountability, transparency, and citizen agency in the face of AI-enabled surveillance and manipulation.
Ensuring advanced AI systems remain aligned with human values and that catastrophic or irreversible outcomes are prevented.
